title: Eric Ries on 'Financial Gravity'
summary: Eric introduces one of the book's central concepts — financial gravity — on Twitter, explaining why organizations need to be deliberately designed to resist the forces that pull them toward corruption and extraction.
blockquote: My new book Incorruptible explains financial gravity and offers ways to resist it. If we want more companies treating people with respect rather than treating them as targets for extraction, we have to build organizations that actually retain the power to say no.
